---
name: New skill request
about: Propose a new Flutter/Dart skill
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Skill name**
Proposed lowercase-hyphen name, e.g. `flutter:widget-testing`.

**What it should cover**
The workflow it teaches and the area it owns.

**Why it matters / how AI gets it wrong today**
The frequency × how-reliably-AI-botches-it case. What stale API or footgun does base Claude emit that this skill would prevent?

**Trigger phrases**
The tasks/keywords that should fire it (for the `description`).

**References**
Official docs / packages this should align with.
